sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-10 12:00:00-05');
SELECT datepart(['year', 'month', 'day'], event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-15 15:30:00-05' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT datepart(['month', 'day'], event_time) AS parts FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
